data.name: SerendipityMorningMist: Dawn, Tobacco, Your Scent
data.detailed_description:
[About Game]

You have been with Chisa Tsukiyama for years. She is a gifted painter—her work captivating yet distant, much like herself. One day, without warning, Chisa tells you she is leaving to study overseas.

During the final five days, you silently agree not to speak of the future, only the present, as if nothing is ending. Every kiss, every claim on each other grows more intense than before. And Chisa —more yielding, more accepting—offers herself to you without resistance.

[Game Features]

  • Exquisite artistic presentation

  • Full voice acting for the heroine, Chisa Tsukiyama

  • Rich interactive mechanics delivering a realistic interactive experience

  • Both first-person and third-person perspectives for a multi-angle immersive experience

  • Presented with Unity and Live2D, featuring Live2D characters across all scenes

  • High-definition visuals with full 4K support

[Game Systems]

Ultra-Immersive Interactive Experiences

Cling to these final five days together—the moments you look forward to most after every long day. Seize every chance to leave your presence etched into Chisa’s body.

Experience deeply immersive Live2D interactions, including head pats, intimate touches, caresses, teasing gestures, etc.—each movement rendered in vivid detail. As her affection level rises through your touch, new narrative paths unfold.

For now, Chisa will not turn you away.

Fully Voiced Heroine

All of Chisa's love are woven into her voice. Full voice acting delivers a raw and intimate experience. During conversations, you may choose responses based on your desires, and Chisa will respond to each one—softly, willingly, and honestly.

[Character Profile]

Name: Chisa Tsukiyama

Age: 23

Height: 164 cm

Figure: D cup

Birthday: January 13

Zodiac Sign: Aquarius

A slightly lazy and unkempt painter, Chisa spends her days smoking, drinking, and avoiding the outside world, instinctively sealing off her heart as a form of self-protection.

She is afraid of the future—afraid she cannot give you the promises you deserve—so she chooses to cut things off before being hurt you. Every serious conversation between you ends in physical closeness; it is both her way of loving you and her way of escaping.

During sex, she becomes extremely obedient—like a small cat desperate for its owner’s affection, clinging to touch as her only form of reassurance.

data.short_description: Your girlfriend Chisa Tsukiyama suddenly decides to leave to study overseas. Each lingering touch, each sharp intake of breath, each faint sting left behind becomes a quiet proof that you still exist to one another. You mark each other in your room, until the countdown reaches zero.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 法文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 (64-bit) / Windows 10 (64-bit) / Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-3210 / AMD A8-7600
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GT 430 / AMD Radeon HD 5450 / Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit) / Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6400 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon R7 260X（2GB VRAM）
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 (64-bit) / Windows 10 (64-bit) / Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-3210 / AMD A8-7600
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GT 430 / AMD Radeon HD 5450 / Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit) / Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6400 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon R7 260X（2GB VRAM）
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
